articles.title: MPESB Jail Prahari and Forest Guard admit card 2026 released at esb.mp.gov.in: Direct link to download hall tickets
articles.summary: The Madhya Pradesh Staff Selection Board (MPESB) has released admit cards for the Van Rakshak and Jail Prahari Recruitment Examination 2026. Candidates can download their hall tickets from esb.mp.gov.in to appear for the exam scheduled from June 4 to June 19, 2026.

articles.title: KCET 2026 result date: When will KEA release UGCET scorecards?
articles.summary: Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET) 2026 results are expected soon on cetonline.karnataka.gov.in, likely after June 1st. Over 3.3 lakh candidates can check their scorecards online using application number and name.

articles.title: REET Mains Result 2026 out at rssb.rajasthan.gov.in; merit list released for 7,759 teacher posts: Check direct link to download here
articles.summary: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has announced the REET Mains Result 2026 for Level 1 and Level 2 examinations on its official website. Candidates can now check the merit list PDF for the recruitment of 7,759 third-grade teacher posts.

articles.title: HPBOSE opens Class 10, 12 compartment and improvement exam registrations 2026; June 1 last date to apply without late fee
articles.summary: Himachal Pradesh Board has opened registrations for Class 10 and 12 compartment and improvement exams 2026. Students can apply without a late fee until June 1, 2026, with a ₹1000 late fee applicable until June 5.
